title: Block Variants
description: Provides tons of blocks that are missing in vanilla
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/oIn70Oc.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/ru9iTi8.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/kgeifoT.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/cKA6UQX.png) Block Variants provides you tons of blocks that are missing in vanilla like Polished Diorite Walls and Amethyst Slabs.
It also offers alternate ways craft things e.g. Furnances from Granite (use [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to find out more). (1.19.2+) requires [Ametrin API](https://modrinth.com/mod/ametrin) ## Check the [Biomes O' Plenty Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-variants-biomes-o-plenty) ## Check the [Oh The Biomes We've Gone Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-variants-bwg)
